name: Intel Core i7 12700K 12th Gen Processor
description: Intel Core i7 12700K 12th Gen Processor What is Intel Core i7 12700K 12th Gen Processor price in Pakistan? Intel Core i7 12700K 12th Gen Processor price in Pakistan is Rs.78,000. This unlocked CPU features 12 cores (8 Performance + 4 Efficient) and 20 threads with boost clock speeds up to 5.0 GHz, delivering strong performance for gaming and productivity. It’s built on the LGA 1700 platform and supports both DDR4 and DDR5 memory along with PCIe 5.0 for next-gen GPU and fast storage compatibility
